notes: Raw API response payloads below. Each api_responses entry contains the full request payload and HTTP response body as returned by USAspending.gov. The psc_totals dict shows total obligated spending per PSC code for FY2024 and FY2023. These are government-wide totals for each PSC category, not workload-specific.
